prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2024 年理科最低位次分别为约 1656→1730→1409→1153 名，整体呈前移趋势，尤其近两年位次提升明显（2023→2024 年前移约 256 名）；2025 年，但结合声誉信号推断位次继续稳定在约 1150 名附近，近年竞争持续加剧；2026 年物理类计划增至 19 人，较近年基准扩招约 3 人（+18.75%），扩招幅度较大，将导致竞争有所缓解、位次后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜排名约第 37 名（2026 年），近年排名稳定在 35–37 名区间，属于中上水平理工类强校，对考生吸引力持续较强；2025 年高考周期声誉评价偏正面，投档线稳步提升、入选国家卓越工程师学院、保研率提升至 27% 等利好信号明显；2026 年周期因实验室爆炸事件转为偏负面，但整体关注度一般（抖音热度排名第 61，评价"一般"），负面舆情影响有限；拥有力学 A、机械工程 A、管理科学与工程 A、航空宇航科学与技术 A-、控制科学与工程 A-、信息与通信工程 A-、软件工程 A- 等 7 个 A- 及以上学科，航空航天类、电子信息类等王牌专业对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信、电气工程、计算机类等南航核心招生专业社会热度持续偏高（2 024 年均为高热推荐/推荐），相关专业报考竞争激烈；青海省 2026 年物理类考生约 30864 人（估算），较 2025 年 30457 人略有增加，竞争环境小幅收紧；南京航空航天大学位于江苏省南京市，属东部发达地区，对西部省份考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在青海省招生占比极小（近年约 0.3%–0.4%），招生规模变化对全国整体影响可忽略，但对青海本地考生感知明显。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2024 年基准位次约 1153 名、2026 年扩招约 18.75%（从 16 人增至 19 人）导致位次后移约 130 名的 ，以及学校声誉持续向好、考生人数小幅增加等修正因素，预测 2026 年最低位次约 1269 名，较 2025 年基准后移约 116 名；区间 1078–1460 名，半宽 191 名覆盖历史波动与模型不确定度。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 航空航天类
- 电子信息类
- 飞行器控制与信息工程
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 机械工程
- 车辆工程（智能无人系统）
- 交通运输（民航电子电气工程）
- 能源与动力工程（大飞机）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 核工程类
- 测控技术与仪器
- 物联网工程
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 1078–1460 名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报（机械工程、车辆工程、交通运输等），一档专业（航空航天类、电子信息类）作为冲刺，三档专业（核工程类、测控技术与仪器）作为保底。 位次明显优于区间下限（<1100 名）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（>1400 名）应以三档保底为主。南航航空航天类、电子信息类等优势专业竞争激烈，建议结合学科评估等级与社会热度综合判断。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2024, the minimum rankings for science were approximately 1656 → 1730 → 1409 → 1153, showing an overall forward trend, especially with significant improvement in the last two years (2023→2024 forward shift of about 256 places); in 2025, based on reputation signals, the ranking is inferred to continue stabilizing around 1150, with competition intensifying in recent years; in 2026, the physics category enrollment plan increases to 19 students, an expansion of about 3 students (+18.75%) compared to the recent baseline, which will alleviate competition and cause a backward shift in ranking.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 37th in the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking (2026), stable in the 35–37 range in recent years, a mid-to-high level strong science and engineering school with sustained strong appeal to candidates; in the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, reputation evaluation is generally positive, with clear positive signals such as steadily increasing admission scores, selection for the National Excellent Engineer Academy, and a graduate school recommendation rate rising to 27%; in the 2026 cycle, due to a laboratory explosion incident, the reputation turns slightly negative, but overall attention is moderate (Douyin popularity ranking 61, rated "average"), with limited impact from negative public opinion; has 7 A- or above disciplines including Mechanics A, Mechanical Engineering A, Management Science and Engineering A, Aerospace Science and Technology A-, Control Science and Engineering A-, Information and Communication Engineering A-, Software Engineering A-, with strong appeal to high-scoring candidates in aerospace, electronic information, and other flagship majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, Computer Science and other core NUAA enrollment majors continue to have high social popularity (all highly recommended/recommended in 2024), with fierce competition for related majors; in 2026, Qinghai Province has approximately 30,864 physics category candidates (estimated), a slight increase from 30,457 in 2025, slightly tightening the competitive environment; Nanjing University of Aeronautics and Astronautics is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, an eastern developed region, with strong regional appeal to candidates from western provinces; the school's enrollment proportion in Qinghai Province is very small (approximately 0.3%–0.4% in recent years), so changes in enrollment scale have negligible impact nationwide but are clearly perceived by local Qinghai candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2024 baseline ranking of approximately 1153, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 18.75% (from 16 to 19 students) causing a backward shift of about 130 places, and correction factors such as continued positive school reputation and a slight increase in candidate numbers, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 1269, a backward shift of about 116 places from the 2025 baseline; range 1078–1460, half-width 191 covering historical fluctuations and model uncertainty.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Aerospace Engineering
- Electronic Information
- Flight Vehicle Control and Information Engineering
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Mechanical Engineering
- Vehicle Engineering (Intelligent Unmanned Systems)
- Transportation (Civil Aviation Electronic and Electrical Engineering)
- Energy and Power Engineering (Large Aircraft)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Nuclear Engineering
- Measurement and Control Technology and Instruments
- Internet of Things Engineering
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 1078–1460, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Mechanical Engineering, Vehicle Engineering, Transportation, etc.) as the main choices, Tier 1 majors (Aerospace Engineering, Electronic Information) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors (Nuclear Engineering, Measurement and Control Technology and Instruments) as safety options. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<1100), focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors; if the ranking is close to the upper limit (>1400), prioritize Tier 3 safety options. NUAA's advantageous majors such as Aerospace Engineering and Electronic Information are highly competitive; it is recommended to make a comprehensive judgment based on discipline evaluation grades and social popularity.

_translation.university_name_en: Nanjing University of Aeronautics and Astronautics
